inputs.label: Rider Weight
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of the cyclist including clothing and helmet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of the cyclist including clothing and helmet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kıyafet ve kask dahil bisikletçinin toplam kütlesi.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse totale du cycliste, y compris vêtements et casque.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa total del ciclista incluyendo ropa y casco.

inputs.label: Bike Weight
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the bicycle including accessories.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the bicycle including accessories.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse du vélo, y compris accessoires.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa de la bicicleta incluyendo accesorios.

inputs.label: Power Output
inputs.businessContext: Average power generated by the cyclist over the duration.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average power generated by the cyclist over the duration.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Süre boyunca bisikletçi tarafından üretilen ortalama güç.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance moyenne générée par le cycliste sur la durée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencia media generada por el ciclista durante la duración.

inputs.label: Duration
inputs.businessContext: Time period over which the power is sustained.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time period over which the power is sustained.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeitraum, über den die Leistung aufrechterhalten wird.
